desc: 2,400 sq.ft. on busy Highway 35. Zoned Business Highway. Office facing highway with large garage in back. Permitted uses include retail, professional offices, computer training, health & fitness club. May allow 3 bays for auto repair.
description:
2,400 sq.ft. commercial space on busy Highway 35 in Hazlet — Zoned Business Highway, offering exceptional visibility and flexible use options.

The layout features a highway-facing office area with a large garage in the rear. Permitted uses include retail, professional offices, computer training, health & fitness club, and more. Subject to municipal approval, 3 bays may be allowed for auto repair use.
